I have been a loyal customer for over three years and I want to explain in detail what has been happening with my account over the past two weeks because it has been extremely frustrating and I need this resolved as soon as possible. First, on the fifteenth of this month I noticed that I was charged twice for my monthly subscription, once on the fifteenth and again on the sixteenth, and I have already checked my bank statement multiple times to confirm this is not a mistake on my end, it is clearly a duplicate charge from your system and I would like a refund for the extra payment as soon as possible since this is affecting my budget for this month quite significantly. Second, separately from the billing issue, I have also been completely unable to log into my account since Tuesday. Every time I enter my correct password, which I have triple checked and even reset twice through the forgot password flow, I get an error message saying invalid credentials, and this is extremely frustrating because I rely on this account daily for my work and not being able to access it has caused real problems for me professionally. I have tried clearing my browser cache, using a different browser entirely, and even trying from my phone on a completely different network, and the exact same login failure happens every single time without exception. Third, while I have your attention, I also wanted to mention that it would be a really nice quality of life improvement if the platform supported a dark mode option in the settings menu, since I often work late at night and the bright white interface is quite hard on my eyes after a few hours of continuous use, though I understand this is a much lower priority compared to the billing and login issues described above which genuinely need urgent attention from your support team as soon as possible today. Thank you for your patience in reading through this long message and I hope to hear back from your team very soon regarding all three of these matters.
